data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of capturing failure reasons and linking endpoints, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data regarding failure reasons or their linkage to endpoints. The linked use case mentions the need for failure reason capture and endpoint linkage, yet there is no evidence in the prior steps that confirms this requirement is met. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of failure reason capture and endpoint linkage as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
